summary: Replayed ADR 0333 from the latest realistic origin/main tip by preserving the shared `.local` bootstrap alias contract on exact main, refreshing canonical truth and generated status surfaces around that contract, and re-verifying the controller-local and repo-automation paths without recording a new platform-version bump because the bootstrap overlay capability was already proven live on platform version 0.130.98.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python -m pytest tests/test_materialize_bootstrap_key_alias.py tests/test_controller_automation_toolkit.py tests/test_preflight_controller_local.py tests/test_remote_exec.py tests/test_ephemeral_windmill_wrappers.py tests/test_provision_operator.py tests/test_validation_runner_contracts.py tests/test_atlas_schema.py -q` returned `80 passed in 21.96s`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-mainline-targeted-tests-r3.txt`.

`uv run --with jsonschema --with pyyaml python3 scripts/validate_dependency_graph.py`, `uv run --with jsonschema --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_dependency_diagram.py --check`, `python3 scripts/generate_diagrams.py --check`, and `python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate` all passed on the exact-main replay, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-mainline-dependency-graph-r3.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-mainline-live-apply-receipts-r3.txt`.

verification.check: Exact-main bookkeeping and canonical truth refresh
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/workstream_registry.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_status_docs.py --write`, and `uv run --with jsonschema --with pyyaml python3 scripts/platform_manifest.py --write` refreshed the merged workstream registry, root summaries, and platform manifest from source, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-mainline-workstream-registry-r3.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-mainline-canonical-truth-r2.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-mainline-status-docs-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-mainline-platform-manifest-r2.txt`.

`LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` still reports repository version `0.178.3`, platform version `0.130.98`, `0 workstreams in progress`, and a blocked numbered release cut only because unrelated `controller_dependency_gap` waiver blockers remain open through `2026-04-06`; `LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 python3 scripts/release_manager.py --bump patch --dry-run` shows the next candidate repository version would be `0.178.4`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-mainline-release-status-r3.json` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-mainline-release-dry-run-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Repo automation and latest-main gate replay
verification.observed: `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces data-models generated-docs generated-portals` and `make pre-push-gate` both passed on the refreshed exact-main tree; the remote build-server run timed out only inside `atlas-lint` when Atlas attempted to reach the ephemeral Postgres host-gateway address, and the governed local fallback reran only `atlas-lint` successfully before merging the final gate status, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-mainline-validate-repo-r8.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-adr-0333-mainline-pre-push-gate-r2.txt`.

notes: This receipt becomes the canonical exact-main audit trail for ADR 0333 while preserving the earlier branch-local live-apply receipt as the first proof that the shared bootstrap alias contract was already live on platform version 0.130.98.

The merged exact-main replay keeps `Implemented In Repo Version` and `Included In Repo Version` at `not yet` because the repository-wide release manager remains blocked by unrelated open waiver receipts outside this workstream.

The final exact-main gate passed after the controlled local fallback reran only `atlas-lint`, so this receipt captures the completed merge-ready state that can be committed and pushed to `origin/main`.
